name: Fear Eater  (Cleansed DreadHawk)
description: Fear Eater, once the deadly assassin Dredhawk, now a hero who wields terror as a weapon for justice. Agile, relentless, and cloaked in shadows, he strikes from darkness with unnerving precision, terrifying criminals while sparing their lives. His mask, a nightmarish birdlike visage, hides a calculating mind and a thrill-seeker’s grin, making him both unpredictable and lethal in pursuit of redemption. Fear Eater turns fear into a shield, a lure, and a blade, ensuring that every enemy knows the weight of their actions before justice lands.
creator: ArcWarden
